languages.text: "Немыслимо..." {n}Эоганн, напротив, чуть смещается вперед, забыв о любой предосторожности.{/n} "Мифологема, обретшая плоть. Мне доводилось слышать о гало окулус и даруемом им бессмертии прежде, но то были лишь профанные домыслы. Если хоть капля из них — правда, то носитель этого артефакта является бесценным экземпляром для изучения".

"Inconceivable..." {n}Eogunn, however, moves a step closer, forgetting all caution.{/n} "A mythologeme made flesh. I've heard of the Halo Oculus and the immortality it brings, but those were just profane rumours. Should any drop of it prove true, the bearer of this artefact is a priceless specimen for analysis."
languages.original_text: "Немыслимо..." {n}Эоганн, напротив, чуть смещается вперед, забыв о любой предосторожности.{/n} "Мифологема, обретшая плоть. Мне доводилось слышать о гало окулус и даруемом им бессмертии прежде, но то были лишь профанные домыслы. Если хоть капля из них — правда, то носитель этого артефакта является бесценным экземпляром для изучения".

"Inconceivable..." {n}Eogunn, however, moves a step closer, forgetting all caution.{/n} "A mythologeme made flesh. I've heard of the Halo Oculus and the immortality it brings, but those were just profane rumors. Should any drop of it prove true, the bearer of this artefact is a priceless specimen for analysis."

"Inconceivable..." {n}Eogunn, however, moves a step closer, forgetting all caution.{/n} "A mythologeme made flesh. I've heard of the Halo Oculus and the immortality it brings, but those were just profane rumours. Should any drop of it prove true, the bearer of this artefact is a priceless specimen for analysis."

"Inconceivable..." {n}Eogunn, however, moves a step closer, forgetting all caution.{/n} "A mythologeme made flesh. I've heard of the Halo Oculus and the immortality it brings, but those were just profane rumours. Should any drop of it prove true, the bearer of this artefact is a priceless specimen for analysis."

languages.text: «Inconcebible...». {n}Eogunn, por su parte, se acerca un paso, echando la precaución al viento.{/n} «Es un mito hecho carne. Había oído hablar del Halo Oculus y de la inmortalidad que ofrece, pero eran solo rumores blasfemos. Si un solo ápice de ellos es cierto, el portador de este artefacto sería un espécimen de valor incalculable para su estudio».
languages.original_text: "Inconceivable..." {n}Eogunn, however, moves a step closer, forgetting all caution.{/n} "A mythologeme made flesh. I've heard of the Halo Oculus and the immortality it brings, but those were just profane rumours. Should any drop of it prove true, the bearer of this artefact is a priceless specimen for analysis."

traits.locale_text: «Inconcebible...». {n}Eogunn, por su parte, se acerca un paso, echando la precaución al viento.{/n} «Es un mito hecho carne. Había oído hablar del Halo Oculus y de la inmortalidad que ofrece, pero eran solo rumores blasfemos. Si un solo ápice de ellos es cierto, el portador de este artefacto sería un espécimen de valor incalculable para su estudio».

languages.text: “不可思议……”{n}然而，伊奥贡却朝前迈了一步，将谨慎抛在了脑后。{/n}“神话之辞竟然道成肉身。我听说过光晕之眼及其带来的永生，但那些都是亵渎的传闻。哪怕其中只有万分之一属实，那这件圣物的持有者都会是无价的研究样本。”
languages.original_text: "Inconceivable..." {n}Eogunn, however, moves a step closer, forgetting all caution.{/n} "A mythologeme made flesh. I've heard of the Halo Oculus and the immortality it brings, but those were just profane rumours. Should any drop of it prove true, the bearer of this artefact is a priceless specimen for analysis."

traits.locale_text: “不可思议……”{n}然而，伊奥贡却朝前迈了一步，将谨慎抛在了脑后。{/n}“神话之辞竟然道成肉身。我听说过光晕之眼及其带来的永生，但那些都是亵渎的传闻。哪怕其中只有万分之一属实，那这件圣物的持有者都会是无价的研究样本。”

languages.text: "Unfassbar ..." {n}Eogunn, tritt einen Schritt näher und lässt alle Vorsicht fahren.{/n} "Ein Fleisch gewordenes Mythologem. Ich habe vom Halo Oculus und der von ihm gewährten Unsterblichkeit gehört, aber das waren alles nur gottlose Gerüchte. Sollte sich auch nur ein Funke davon bewahrheiten, ist der Träger dieses Artefaktes ein unbezahlbares Forschungsobjekt."
languages.original_text: "Inconceivable..." {n}Eogunn, however, moves a step closer, forgetting all caution.{/n} "A mythologeme made flesh. I've heard of the Halo Oculus and the immortality it brings, but those were just profane rumours. Should any drop of it prove true, the bearer of this artefact is a priceless specimen for analysis."

traits.locale_text: "Unfassbar ..." {n}Eogunn, tritt einen Schritt näher und lässt alle Vorsicht fahren.{/n} "Ein Fleisch gewordenes Mythologem. Ich habe vom Halo Oculus und der von ihm gewährten Unsterblichkeit gehört, aber das waren alles nur gottlose Gerüchte. Sollte sich auch nur ein Funke davon bewahrheiten, ist der Träger dieses Artefaktes ein unbezahlbares Forschungsobjekt."

languages.text: « Impensable... {n}songe Eogunn, ce qui ne l'empêche pas de se rapprocher au mépris du danger.{/n} Un mythologème fait chair. J'ai entendu parler de l'Oculus du Halo et de l'immortalité qu'il confère, mais ce n'étaient guère que de vagues rumeurs. Si un dixième de ce que l'on raconte est vrai, le porteur de cet artefact est un spécimen inestimable pour la science. »
languages.original_text: "Inconceivable..." {n}Eogunn, however, moves a step closer, forgetting all caution.{/n} "A mythologeme made flesh. I've heard of the Halo Oculus and the immortality it brings, but those were just profane rumours. Should any drop of it prove true, the bearer of this artefact is a priceless specimen for analysis."

traits.locale_text: « Impensable... {n}songe Eogunn, ce qui ne l'empêche pas de se rapprocher au mépris du danger.{/n} Un mythologème fait chair. J'ai entendu parler de l'Oculus du Halo et de l'immortalité qu'il confère, mais ce n'étaient guère que de vagues rumeurs. Si un dixième de ce que l'on raconte est vrai, le porteur de cet artefact est un spécimen inestimable pour la science. »

languages.text: "Akıl almaz..." {n}Ancak Eogunn, tüm tedbirleri unutarak bir adım daha yaklaşıyor.{/n} "Beden bulmuş bir mitologem. Hale Okulus'u ve onun getirdiği ölümsüzlüğü duymuştum ama bunlar sadece kutsal olmayan söylentilerdi. En ufak bir kısmı bile doğruysa bu eserin taşıyıcısı, analiz için paha biçilmez bir örnek."
languages.original_text: "Inconceivable..." {n}Eogunn, however, moves a step closer, forgetting all caution.{/n} "A mythologeme made flesh. I've heard of the Halo Oculus and the immortality it brings, but those were just profane rumours. Should any drop of it prove true, the bearer of this artefact is a priceless specimen for analysis."

traits.locale_text: "Akıl almaz..." {n}Ancak Eogunn, tüm tedbirleri unutarak bir adım daha yaklaşıyor.{/n} "Beden bulmuş bir mitologem. Hale Okulus'u ve onun getirdiği ölümsüzlüğü duymuştum ama bunlar sadece kutsal olmayan söylentilerdi. En ufak bir kısmı bile doğruysa bu eserin taşıyıcısı, analiz için paha biçilmez bir örnek."

languages.text: 「信じられない…」{n}しかし、エオグンは警戒を忘れて一歩近づいた。{/n}「神話に実体化した存在。ハロー・オクルスと不死の話を聞いたことがあるが、それはただの俗説に過ぎなかった。もしほんの一滴でも真実であれば、この遺物は分析対象として貴重な存在だ。」
languages.original_text: "Inconceivable..." {n}Eogunn, however, moves a step closer, forgetting all caution.{/n} "A mythologeme made flesh. I've heard of the Halo Oculus and the immortality it brings, but those were just profane rumours. Should any drop of it prove true, the bearer of this artefact is a priceless specimen for analysis."

traits.locale_text: 「信じられない…」{n}しかし、エオグンは警戒を忘れて一歩近づいた。{/n}「神話に実体化した存在。ハロー・オクルスと不死の話を聞いたことがあるが、それはただの俗説に過ぎなかった。もしほんの一滴でも真実であれば、この遺物は分析対象として貴重な存在だ。」
